mapper.update: /** PayInfoMapper.updateOffline */ UPDATE CMN_KFTC_EVIDENCE SET EVIDENCE_TYPE_CD = #{evidenceTypeCd}, DPST_BANK_CD = #{dpstBankCd}, DPST_ACNT_NUM = CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(#{dpstAcntNum}), DPST_PRSN_NM = #{dpstPrsnNm} WHERE KFTC_EVIDENCE_SEQ = #{kftcEvidenceSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getFile1 */ KFTC_EVIDENCE_SEQ ,REAL_FILE_PATH ,REAL_FILE_NM ,REAL_FILE_PATH || REAL_FILE_NM AS REAL_FILE_FULL_PATH ,DPST_BANK_CD ,CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(DPST_ACNT_NUM, ' ')) AS DPST_ACNT_NUM ,DPST_PRSN_NM FROM CMN_KFTC_EVIDENCE WHERE KFTC_EVIDENCE_SEQ = #{kftcEvidenceSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getFileNmSeq */ TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_MSP_PAYINFO_01.NEXTVAL, '000000000000000000000')) AS FILE_NM_SEQ FROM DUAL
SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.failCnt */ COUNT(*) FROM CMN_KFTC_BATCH_DTL WHERE KFTC_MST_SEQ = #{kftcMstSeq} AND (FILE_REG_YN = 'N' OR (APPROVAL_CD != '0000' OR APPROVAL_CD IS NULL))
SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getFileNm */ REAL_FILE_PATH || REAL_FILE_NM AS FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM CMN_KFTC_EVIDENCE WHERE KFTC_EVIDENCE_SEQ = #{kftcEvidenceSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
/* PayInfoMapper.mspPayinfoImg */ {call MSP_PAYINFO_IMG(?, ?, ?, ?, ?)}

SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getFileDtl1 */ KFTC_DTL_SEQ ,REAL_FILE_DIR ,REAL_FILE_NAME ,REAL_FILE_DIR || REAL_FILE_NAME AS REAL_FILE_FULL_PATH ,DPST_BANK_CD ,CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NVL(DPST_ACNT_NUM, ' ')) AS DPST_ACNT_NUM ,DPST_PRSN_NM FROM CMN_KFTC_BATCH_DTL WHERE KFTC_DTL_SEQ = #{kftcDtlSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getFileNmDtl */ REAL_FILE_DIR || REAL_FILE_NAME AS FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM CMN_KFTC_BATCH_DTL WHERE KFTC_DTL_SEQ = #{kftcDtlSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getPayinfoDataSynMST */ KFTC_MST_SEQ FROM CMN_KFTC_BATCH_MST WHERE 1=1 AND (APPROVAL_CD != '0000' OR APPROVAL_CD IS NULL)

SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getPayinfoDataSynDTL */ KFTC.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS subLinkName , KFTC.BAN AS ban , CKE.REAL_FILE_PATH AS realFilePath , CKE.REAL_FILE_NM AS realFileNm , KFTC.KFTC_MST_SEQ AS kftcMstSeq , KFTC.KFTC_DTL_SEQ AS kftcDtlSeq , KFTC.REAL_FILE_NAME AS deleteFileName FROM (SELECT KBM.KFTC_MST_SEQ , KBD.KFTC_DTL_SEQ , KBD.BILL_ACNT_NO AS BAN , FN_GET_PAYINFO_CN(KBD.BILL_ACNT_NO) AS CONTRACT_NUM , KBD.REAL_FILE_NAME FROM CMN_KFTC_BATCH_MST KBM , CMN_KFTC_BATCH_DTL KBD WHERE KBM.KFTC_MST_SEQ = KBD.KFTC_MST_SEQ AND KBM.KFTC_MST_SEQ = #{kftcMstSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND KBD.READY_CD != '0002' AND KBD.SEND_CD != '0000') KFTC , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP MR , (SELECT KE.BAN , KE.REAL_FILE_PATH , KE.REAL_FILE_NM FROM CMN_KFTC_EVIDENCE KE WHERE 1=1 AND (BAN, RVISN_DTTM) IN (SELECT KE1.BAN , MAX(KE1.RVISN_DTTM) RVISN_DTTM FROM CMN_KFTC_EVIDENCE KE1 WHERE 1=1 AND TO_NUMBER(KE1.RGST_DT) <= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) AND TO_NUMBER(KE1.VALID_DT) >= TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) GROUP BY BAN)) CKE WHERE 1=1 AND KFTC.CONTRACT_NUM = MR.CONTRACT_NUM AND KFTC.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND KFTC.BAN = CKE.BAN(+) AND (CKE.REAL_FILE_PATH IS NOT NULL AND CKE.REAL_FILE_NM IS NOT NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE CMN_KFTC_BATCH_DTL SET REAL_FILE_NAME = '' ,REAL_FILE_DIR = '' ,RVISN_ID = #{sessionUserId} ,RVISN_DTTM = SYSDATE ,FILE_REG_YN = 'N' WHERE KFTC_DTL_SEQ = #{kftcDtlSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT CGCM.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST CGM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CGCM WHERE 1=1 AND CGM.GRP_ID = CGCM.GRP_ID AND CGM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGCM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND CGCM.ETC1 = 'SCAN' AND CGM.GRP_ID = #{grpId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT A.EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 AS VALUE , A.DTL_CD_NM AS TEXT FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CD_GROUP_ID ='BNK' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT B.CD_VAL AS VALUE , B.CD_DSC AS TEXT FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0216' AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.ETC1 = 'PAYINFO'

/* PayInfoMapper.getEvidenceFileExtList */ SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0212' AND B.ETC2 = #{etc2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* PayInfoMapper."getEvidenceFileSize" */ SELECT B.ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0214' AND B.CD_VAL = #{cdVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* PayInfoMapper."getEvidenceFileSizeTargetChk" */ SELECT B.ETC3 FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0212' AND B.CD_VAL = #{cdVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* PayInfoMapper.getEvidenceFileExtList */ SELECT B.CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0212' AND B.ETC3 = #{etc3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* PayInfoMapper."getEvidenceFileSizeMsg" */ SELECT B.CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_MST A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRP_ID = B.GRP_ID AND A.USG_YN = 'Y' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.GRP_ID = 'CMN0214' AND B.CD_VAL = #{cdVal, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM CMN_KFTC_BATCH_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND KFTC_DTL_SEQ = #{kftcDtlSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND READY_CD = '0002'
SELECT A.DTL_CD AS VALUE , A.DTL_CD_NM AS TEXT FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CD_GROUP_ID ='BNK' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT A.DTL_CD AS VALUE , A.DTL_CD_NM AS TEXT FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP A WHERE 1=1 AND A.CD_GROUP_ID ='CRD' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.EXPNSN_STR_VAL3 = #{expnsnVal}

SELECT /* PayInfoMapper.getFileNmSec */ FILE_PATH || FILE_NAME AS FILE_NM FROM CMN_KFTC_NON_BIND_FILE_HST WHERE TO_CHAR(CMN_KFTC_NON_BIND_FILE_HST_SEQ) = #{fileId} UNION ALL SELECT ORIGIN_DIR AS FILE_NAME FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId}
